reviews.comment:
Cada día la atención es peor y los empleados más groseros.  Cobran hasta para inflar los neumáticos.  Desastre hasta para los que son socios. Suerte que hay varias estaciones de servicio por la,zona

(Translated by Google)
Every day the service gets worse and the employees get ruder. They even charge for inflating tires. It's a disaster, even for members. Luckily there are several gas stations in the area.

reviews.comment:
Es rápido. Por más que haya cola, como son muchos surtidores, la cola avanza rápido. También hago cambio de aceite reservando turno. No se si es barato o caro el cambio de aceite, pero me resulta cómodo.

(Translated by Google)
It's fast. Even though there's a line, because there are so many pumps, it moves quickly. I also get my oil changed by booking an appointment. I don't know if the oil change is cheap or expensive, but it's convenient.
